title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (5) لسنة 1993 بشأن ميزانية مجلس الشورى للسنتين الماليتين 1993, 1994
title_en: Decree No. (3) of 1993 amending some provisions of the Law regulating Pensions and Retirement Gratuities for officers and Personnel of the Bahrain Defence Force, and Public Security, promulgated by Legislative Decree No. (11) of 1976
